text:

Author: pkubaj

Log:
  graphics/mupdf: fix build with big-endian architectures

  Remove files/patch-thirdparty_lcms2_src_cmsmd5.c to fix build.

  The port builds without this patch now and the patch actually breaks build.

  PR:		237930
